message:
fix(reservations): deliver force_release notification to holder inbox (br-302z)

force_release_file_reservation used create_message() which only inserts
into the messages table without creating message_recipients entries.
The notification was a ghost message that never appeared in the holder's
inbox.

Fix: use create_message_with_recipients() with the holder agent as a
"to" recipient, so the notification is actually deliverable via
fetch_inbox.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"br-2yw0","title":"Guard parity: unit + integration tests","description":"## Objective
Add unit/integration tests for guard behavior beyond the E2E repo test.

## Scope
- Path matching (pathspec + fnmatch fallback).
- Pre‑commit scanning (staged files, rename handling).
- Pre‑push scanning (commit range).
- Gate on `WORKTREES_ENABLED`/`GIT_IDENTITY_ENABLED` per legacy guard.py.

## Tests
- Unit tests for pathspec matches and denylist/allowlist behavior.
- Integration tests using temp git repo with staged changes and renames.

## Logging/Artifacts
- Store guard decision logs under `tests/artifacts/guard/<timestamp>/`.

## Acceptance Criteria
1. Guard behavior matches legacy for staged/renamed files and gate flags.
2.  {"id":"br-33ha","title":"Comprehensive test coverage hardening (unit + E2E)","description":"Comprehensive test coverage hardening for the mcp-agent-mail-rust workspace.

- 2,263+ workspace tests, 0 failures
- Server/TUI unit tests: DONE (Tracks 1-2 closed, ~900+ tests added)
- E2E suites: 28+ scripts with 135+ test cases

## Remaining Work (9 task beads across 4 tracks)

### Track 3: HTTP-level E2E (br-33ha.4) — 2 beads
- Health endpoints (br-33ha.4.3) — 10+ assertions
- CORS preflight (br-33ha.4.4) — 12+ assertions

### Track 4: Edge cases (br-33ha.5) — 1 bead
- DB corruption recovery (br-33ha.5.5) — 10+ assertions

### Track 5: Multi-agent production scenarios (br-33ha.6) — 3 beads
- Cross-project messaging (br-33ha.6.1) — 15+ assertions
- Concurrent agents (br-33ha.6.2) — 12+ assertions
- Contact policy enforcement (br-33ha.6.4) — 15+ assertions  ← NEW

### Track 6: Quality & observability (br-33ha.7) — 3 beads
- Logging audit (br-33ha.7.1) — audit ~28 suites
- JSON summary output (br-33ha.7.2) — CI integration [blocked by .7.1]
- Tool metrics E2E (br-33ha.7.3) — 10+ assertions

## Expected Totals When Complete
- ~85+ new E2E assertions across 6 new test scripts
- Logging improvements across ~28 existing suites
- JSON CI report infrastructure","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-09T03:14:19.386663950Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T04:39:54.749574466Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T04:39:54.749559628Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
